ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] (World) Read through [this article](https://www.bbc.co.uk/bitesize/articles/z4spwsg#z9fnjfr) to find out more about how Parliament works.
[ ] (World) Tour of the Palace of Versailles [video](https://youtu.be/zdYeG4eZNpQ?si=CT5Sj0QyFOKbDEk5) \*parent preview for art images\*

[ ] (World) Watch this [video](https://kids.britannica.com/students/article/Irish-Potato-Famine/603737/media) on the Potato Famine.
[ ] (World) Watch the first 20 minutes of this [documentary](https://youtu.be/-D5GPBYQnZ8?si=UdToDDL9wBNptRIs) to learn about peat.
[ ] (World) Watch "[How the Potato Conquered the World](https://youtu.be/xjUHSv1Vda0?si=c83S6_u7sNN_YXAd)."

[ ] (World) Watch a quick [video](https://youtu.be/rxQcQ5DJqqE?si=D-XuJQ8G7q1HWm32) on the history of Japan.
[ ] (World) Explore this site: "Looking East: How Japan Inspired Monet, Van Gogh, and Other Western Artists."
